    simpa [one_div] using (tendsto_inv_atTop_zero : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝 0))
  have h₂ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k : ℝ)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    exact tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds h₁
  have h₃ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
    (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp h₂
  have h₄ : (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) = fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k) := by
    funext k
    have hk : k * Real.sin (r / k) = Real.sin (r / k) / (1 / k) := mul_sin_as_div r k
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, one_div, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hk
  simpa [h₄, div_eq_mul_inv, one_div, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using h₃

simpa [mul_sin_as_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0_nhdsWithin_ne)

have hk : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    simpa [one_div] using (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0_nat : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0))
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
    have := (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp hk
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc] using this
  have hrewrite :
      (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) =
        (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) := by
    funext k
    by_cases hk0 : k = 0
    · simp [hk0]
    · have : r / k = r * (1 / k) := by field_simp [hk0]
      simp [mul_sin_as_div, this, hk0]
  simpa [hrewrite] using hcomp

have h₁ : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 0) :=
    tendsto_one_div_atTop_nhds_0_nat
  have h₁' : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) :=
    (tendsto_principal.2 (by
      intro x hx
      exact mem_of_superset hx (by intro y hy; exact hy))).2 h₁
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
    (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp h₁'
  have hrewrite :
      (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) =
        (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) := by
    funext k
    have : r * (1 / k) = r / k := by ring
    simpa [this, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc, mul_sin_as_div]
  simpa [hrewrite] using hcomp

have hk : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    simpa [one_div] using (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhdsWithin_0 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0))
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
    (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp hk
  have hEq :
      (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) =
        fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k) := by
    funext k
    have : r / k = r * (1 / k) := by
      simp [div_eq_mul_inv, one_div]
    simp [mul_sin_as_div, this, div_eq_mul_inv, one_div, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
  simpa [hEq] using hcomp

have hk : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    simpa [one_div] using (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝 0))
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) := by
    have : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => Real.sin (r * x) / x) (𝓝[≠] 0) (𝓝 r) :=
      tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r
    exact (this.comp hk)
  have hrew :
      (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) =
        (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) := by
    funext k
    have : r / k = r * (1 / k) := by ring
    simp [mul_sin_as_div, this]
  simpa [hrew] using hcomp

have hk : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    refine (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0.comp ?_).nhdsWithin_of_forall ?_
    · exact tendsto_id
    · intro x hx
      exact one_div_ne_zero.2 hx
  have hcomp :
      Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k)) atTop (𝓝 r) :=
    (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp hk
  have hrewrite :
      (fun k : ℝ => k * Real.sin (r / k)) =
        fun k : ℝ => Real.sin (r * (1 / k)) / (1 / k) := by
    funext k
    by_cases hk0 : k = 0
    · simp [hk0]
    · have : r / k = r * (1 / k) := by
        field_simp [hk0]
      simp [mul_sin_as_div, this, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
  simpa [hrewrite] using hcomp
